name: feature-flow
description: Bundle of 9 skills closing the loop problem → plan → implement+review → API docs → test plan → auto-test → stakeholder brief → deep-understanding handoff, with a Claude⇄Codex peer-debate trio at the front: impl-status (live HTML status tracker), api-contract-writer (caller-facing Markdown API contracts), test-case-writer (interactive HTML test plans), service-test-runner (test plan → pytest → per-TC results), feature-brief (non-technical one-pager for PO/QC), comprehension-coach (interactive teach-until-understood with checklist + quizzes), problem-solver (Claude & Codex debate a hard problem via /codex-think-about, then commit to a final decision), implementation-planner (Claude & Codex deep-dive code and debate via /codex-think-about into an implementation plan, then adversarially review it via /codex-plan-review), plan-implementer (Claude implements the plan, then Claude & Codex review the code via /codex-impl-review for quality and plan-adherence).
